nika inspect · static anatomy
The shape of the run, before the run.
signature-demo.nika.yaml 9 tasks · 8 waves
$ nika inspect signature-demo.nika.yaml release-notes-i18n · 9 tasks · 8 waves · ≥ $0.0000 (floor — unbounded tasks) ◆ discover invoke · nika:glob ↓ ╭ wave 2 ── 2 in parallel ──────╮ │ ◆ digest exec │ │ ◆ stats invoke · nika:jq │ ╰───────────────────────────────╯ ↓ ◆ draft infer · mock/echo ↓ ◆ translate infer · mock/echo · for_each ×? ↓ ◆ survivors invoke · nika:jq ↓ ◆ verify agent · mock/echo ↓ ◆ publish exec · when: ${{ tasks.survivors.output.size() > 0 }} ↓ ◆ report infer · mock/echo (no orphans · DAG check NIKA-DAG-001 clean) parallelism width 2 · can run together: stats · publish pinch discover · report · nothing else runs while these run blast discover blocks 8 · digest blocks 6 · draft blocks 5 · +5 more
nika 0.93.1 · real cli output · mock model · offline · 100-col pty nika.sh 🦋
